tool.name: python_action
tool.description: Perform Python actions using persistent interpreter sessions for cybersecurity tasks. Each session maintains its own namespace until explicitly closed.

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: Action: new_session, execute, close, or inspect current sessions.

parameter.name: code
parameter.description: Python code to execute. Required for new_session and execute.

parameter.name: session_id
parameter.description: Session identifier. Uses default if omitted.

returns.description: Response with session_id, stdout, stderr, result, execution_time, and message.
